Enum Class EndpointOption

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<EndpointOption>
grafioschtrader.types.EndpointOption
All Implemented Interfaces:
StableEnum, Serializable, Comparable<EndpointOption>, Constable
public enum EndpointOption extends Enum<EndpointOption> implements StableEnum
Bitmask flags for feed-type-specific processing options on generic connector endpoints. Each constant declares which feed types it applies to via applicableFeedSupports. The order of constants must not be changed because the byte values are persisted as bitmask positions.

    SKIP_WEEKEND_DATA
    Skip historical price rows that fall on Saturday or Sunday.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • SKIP_WEEKEND_DATA

      public static final EndpointOption SKIP_WEEKEND_DATA
      Skip historical price rows that fall on Saturday or Sunday. Some data providers incorrectly deliver weekend data that Grafioschtrader cannot process.

    • REMOVE_DUPLICATE_DATES

      public static final EndpointOption REMOVE_DUPLICATE_DATES
      Remove duplicate date entries from the historical price response. Some generic connector sources return overlapping data across pagination batches or duplicate rows within a single response. When enabled, only the first entry per date is kept.

    • INTRADAY_USE_LAST_BAR

      public static final EndpointOption INTRADAY_USE_LAST_BAR
      For intraday endpoints whose response is a chronological array of OHLC bars (e.g. BX Swiss /candlestick/week/{ISIN}), pick the last element of the array instead of the first. The default behavior of parseJsonIntraday takes element 0 — correct for snapshot-style endpoints, wrong for time-series-style endpoints where the latest tick lives at the end of the array.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static EndpointOption[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static EndpointOption valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      public static List<EndpointOption> getApplicableOptions(String feedSupport)
